props_metadata.purpose: Tracking critical physical objects for visual consistency and narrative symbolism

smartphone_anthony.description: Modern black smartphone, sleek design, no visible case
smartphone_anthony.symbolism: Connection to the past, source of guilt and hope
smartphone_anthony.visual_rules: Screen light should be cool blue in night scenes
smartphone_anthony.continuity_status: Sent message in Ep 3, currently at Anthony's home

smartphone_jamie.description: White or light-colored smartphone, slightly older model
smartphone_jamie.symbolism: Lifeline, vulnerability, intrusion of the outside world
smartphone_jamie.visual_rules: Often shown in close-up, screen illumination on face
smartphone_jamie.continuity_status: Received message in Ep 4, currently in Jamie's apartment

broken_glass_juice.description: Shattered clear glass, amber-colored liquid (juice) spilled on dark floor
broken_glass_juice.symbolism: Violated safety, sudden violence, mess that cannot be easily ignored
broken_glass_juice.visual_rules: Must reflect light sources, sharp edges visible in close-ups
broken_glass_juice.continuity_status: Created in Ep 4 climax, must remain until cleaned in Ep 5/6

house_keys_anthony.description: Simple metal keys on a small ring
house_keys_anthony.visual_rules: Metallic glint, sound of jingling is important for audio
house_keys_anthony.continuity_status: Used in Ep 3 to enter home

white_bathrobe_jamie.visual_rules: Texture must look soft and heavy, contrasts with cold environment
white_bathrobe_jamie.continuity_status: Worn by Jamie in Ep 4, still wearing it at start of Ep 5

ai_generation_notes.consistency_rule: Always use the same 3D model or reference image for these props across all episodes
